이사야 57:1.content: The righteous perish, and no one lays it to heart. Merciful men are taken away, and no one considers that the righteous is taken away from the evil.

이사야 57:2.content: He enters into peace. They rest in their beds, each one who walks in his uprightness.

이사야 57:3.content: “But draw near here, you sons of a sorceress, you offspring of adulterers and prostitutes.

이사야 57:4.content: Whom do you mock? Against whom do you make a wide mouth and stick out your tongue? Aren’t you children of disobedience and offspring of falsehood,

이사야 57:5.content: you who inflame yourselves among the oaks, under every green tree; who kill the children in the valleys, under the clefts of the rocks?

이사야 57:6.content: Among the smooth stones of the valley is your portion. They, they are your lot. You have even poured a drink offering to them. You have offered an offering. Shall I be appeased for these things?

이사야 57:7.content: On a high and lofty mountain you have set your bed. You also went up there to offer sacrifice.

이사야 57:8.content: You have set up your memorial behind the doors and the posts, for you have exposed yourself to someone besides me, and have gone up. You have enlarged your bed and made you a covenant with them. You loved what you saw on their bed.

이사야 57:9.content: You went to the king with oil, increased your perfumes, sent your ambassadors far off, and degraded yourself even to Sheol.

이사야 57:10.content: You were wearied with the length of your ways; yet you didn’t say, ‘It is in vain.’ You found a reviving of your strength; therefore you weren’t faint.

이사야 57:11.content: “Whom have you dreaded and feared, so that you lie, and have not remembered me, nor laid it to your heart? Haven’t I held my peace for a long time, and you don’t fear me?

이사야 57:12.content: I will declare your righteousness; and as for your works, they will not benefit you.

이사야 57:13.content: When you cry, let those whom you have gathered deliver you; but the wind will take them. a breath will carry them all away: but he who takes refuge in me will possess the land, and will inherit my holy mountain.”

이사야 57:14.content: He will say, “Build up, build up, prepare the way! Remove the stumbling-block out of the way of my people.”

이사야 57:15.content: For the high and lofty One who inhabits eternity, whose name is Holy, says: “I dwell in the high and holy place, with him also who is of a contrite and humble spirit, to revive the spirit of the humble, and to revive the heart of the contrite.

이사야 57:16.content: For I will not contend forever, neither will I always be angry; for the spirit would faint before me, and the souls whom I have made.

이사야 57:17.content: I was angry because of the iniquity of his covetousness and struck him. I hid myself and was angry; and he went on backsliding in the way of his heart.

이사야 57:18.content: I have seen his ways, and will heal him. I will lead him also, and restore comforts to him and to his mourners.

이사야 57:19.content: I create the fruit of the lips: Peace, peace, to him who is far off and to him who is near,” says Yahweh; “and I will heal them.”

이사야 57:20.content: But the wicked are like the troubled sea; for it can’t rest and its waters cast up mire and mud.

이사야 57:21.content: “There is no peace”, says my God, “for the wicked.”
